case_title: ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC. VS. TYRICE DONNELL IVY ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-02-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) TYRICE DONNELL IVY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100074067) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVY, TYRICE DONNELL $8,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,516.55 INTEREST, $275.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,741.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100074300)

OPPOSITION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 100074309) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALL-PRO BAIL BONDS, INC.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-02-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
